title: Vacancy for Category Manager at StayVista South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at StayVista South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the StayVista South Asia Partners family as a Category Manager in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StayVista South Asia Partners:
StayVista South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista South Asia Partners!
